top_signals.title: Workday Rallies After Results Quiet Fears of AI Disruption
top_signals.summary: Workday Inc., a maker of workplace management software, posted better-than-expected results in the first quarter, helping quell concerns that the company will be disrupted by artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Races to Create Domestic Rare Earths Supply
top_signals.summary: Tripp Hornick, principal at Quince Street Strategy, said that the US allowed the mining and manufacturing of rare earth elements to be pushed overseas because investors felt it was too expensive and 'dirty' to back. Now, the US is facing the consequences of moving that supply chain process overseas, as the US and other world powers race to build a system that is not reliant on China for minerals that are key to national security.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pimco’s Ivascyn Says Fed Will Act on Inflation as Yields Spike - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Pimco’s Ivascyn Says Fed Will Act on Inflation as Yields Spike  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
